items.headline: Is Corteva (CTVA) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Its Recent Share Price Gains?
items.summary: If you are wondering whether Corteva's current share price offers value or is already pricing in a lot of optimism, starting with a clear view of its valuation can help you set expectations. Corteva shares last closed at US$77.03, with returns of 13.7% year to date and 8.6% over the past year, while the stock is down 1.6% over the last week and 5.1% over the past month.
